name: Credit Corp Group Limited
analysis: CCP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$12.5900, stop A$11.3652, target A$14.1682 (1.29:1) — then trail it.
